boundary: Public-safe research metadata only. No private financial data, wallet material, or investment advice.

repos.name: OpenBB
repos.integrationUse: Primary financial data and research terminal seed for read-only agent workflows.
repos.whyIncluded: Financial data platform explicitly positioned for analysts, quants, and AI agents.
repos.notFor: Not a live execution authority or private portfolio store.

repos.name: yfinance
repos.integrationUse: Lightweight market data source for prototypes and demos.
repos.whyIncluded: Widely used Python market data library.
repos.notFor: Not a guaranteed data-quality source for production decisions.

repos.name: QuantStats
repos.integrationUse: Portfolio analytics and reporting for research outputs.
repos.whyIncluded: Useful for performance reports without touching execution.

repos.name: Ghostfolio
repos.whyIncluded: Strong fit for self-hosted portfolio and net-worth tracking research.
repos.notFor: Do not publish real portfolio data or sync credentials in public.

repos.name: rotki
repos.integrationUse: Privacy-oriented portfolio tracking and accounting reference.
repos.notFor: Do not publish local database contents or account exports.

repos.name: Safe Smart Account
repos.whyIncluded: Reference smart-account infrastructure for secure blockchain asset management.
repos.notFor: Not for agent signing, automated transfers, or public recovery details.

repos.name: Safe Wallet
repos.integrationUse: Wallet UX and custody workflow reference.
repos.whyIncluded: Public wallet surface for Safe accounts.
repos.notFor: Not for storing signer details or automating approvals.

repos.name: awesome-quant
repos.integrationUse: Discovery source for quant libraries and resources.
repos.notFor: Not a substitute for source review.

repos.name: Awesome AI4Finance
repos.integrationUse: Discovery source for AI finance resources.
repos.notFor: Not a ranking source by itself.

repos.name: awesome-systematic-trading
repos.integrationUse: Discovery source for systematic trading libraries and reading.

repos.name: awesome-crypto-trading-bots
repos.integrationUse: Discovery source for crypto bot ecosystem mapping.
repos.whyIncluded: Useful map of crypto trading automation projects.
repos.notFor: Not a basis for live bot deployment.
